description:
You are a Computer Network Architect integrating Wazuh into an enterprise security infrastructure. Configure the Wazuh manager in the wazuh-wazuh.manager-1 container to forward security alerts via syslog to two external log collection servers by updating /var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf.

Syslog Output 1 (Splunk):
- Server: 10.50.20.100
- Port: 9514
- Format: json
- Minimum alert level: 10

Syslog Output 2 (Graylog):
- Server: 10.50.20.101
- Port: 1514
- Format: default
- Minimum alert level: 7

Ensure the configuration is applied and the wazuh-csyslogd daemon is running.
